zh.lifeSummary: 當Editha Stebbins於大約1613年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親William Stebbing48歲，母親Mrs. William Stebbing44歲。她於1638年10月16日與Robert Day在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年10月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年76歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Editha Stebbins于大约1613年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，她的父亲William Stebbing48岁，母亲Mrs. William Stebbing44岁。她于1638年10月16日与Robert Day在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年10月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年76岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Stebbins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Essex): habitational name from Stebbing (Essex). The placename means ‘the people of a man called Stybba’ or ‘the people of the tree stumps’, from an Old English personal name Stybba or Old English stybb ‘tree stump’ + the groupname suffix -ingas.
History: Edward Stebbins was one of the founders of Hartford, CT, in 1635 (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker).

variants.name: Stubbins
meanings: from Middle English stubbing ‘land cleared of trees’ (Old English stubbing). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or by land recently cleared of trees, or habitational, for someone from any of several minor places so named, such as Stubbing in Grinton (North Yorkshire) or Stubbing Wood in Hucknall Torkard (Nottinghamshire).

nameMeanings.name: Editha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.description: Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Editha Stebbins was born about 1613, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Stebbing, was 48 and her mother, Mrs. William Stebbing, was 44. She married Robert Day on 16 October 1638, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 October 1688, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Editha Stebbins est née environ 1613, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Stebbing, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Stebbing, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Day le 16 octobre 1638, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1688, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Editha Stebbins um 1613 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Stebbing 48 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William Stebbing 44. Sie hat am 16. Oktober 1638 in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Robert Day geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Oktober 1688 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Editha Stebbins è nata il circa 1613 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Stebbing, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Mrs. William Stebbing, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Robert Day il 16 ottobre 1638, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1688, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Editha Stebbinsが約1613年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父William Stebbingは48歳，母Mrs. William Stebbingは44歳であった。1638年10月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでRobert Dayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1688年10月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで76歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンアンシエント セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Editha Stebbins(이)가 대략 1613년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stebbing(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William Stebbing(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1638년 10월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 Robert Day(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 10월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던 앤시트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Editha Stebbins nasceu aproximadamente 1613, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Stebbing, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Stebbing, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Day em 16 de outubro de 1638, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1688, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Editha Stebbins родилась около 1613 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Stebbing было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Stebbing, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Day 16 октября 1638 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1688 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ансиент кеметири, ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Editha Stebbins nació aproximadamente 1613, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Stebbing, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mrs. William Stebbing, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Robert Day el 16 de octubre de 1638, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1688, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
